inputs.label: Volume (m³)
inputs.businessContext: The volume in cubic meters to be converted.

businessContext_i18n.en: The volume in cubic meters to be converted.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Volumen in Kubikmetern, das umgerechnet werden soll.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor (ft³ per m³)
inputs.businessContext: The number of cubic feet per cubic meter. Based on 1 m = 3.28084 ft.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of cubic feet per cubic meter. Based on 1 m = 3.28084 ft.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metreküp başına düşen fit küp sayısı. 1 m = 3,28084 ft esas alınmıştır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl Kubikfuß pro Kubikmeter. Basierend auf 1 m = 3,28084 ft.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Desired number of decimal places for the rounded result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired number of decimal places for the rounded result.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yuvarlatılmış sonuç için istenen ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Anzahl Dezimalstellen für das gerundete Ergebnis.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for safety or conversion margin, typically 1 for exact conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for safety or conversion margin, typically 1 for exact conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güvenlik veya dönüşüm marjı çarpanı, tam dönüşüm için genellikle 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Sicherheits- oder Umrechnungsspanne, typischerweise 1 für exakte Umrechnung.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage uncertainty in the input measurement, affecting output uncertainty.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage uncertainty in the input measurement, affecting output uncertainty.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş ölçümündeki yüzde belirsizlik, çıktı belirsizliğini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Unsicherheit der Eingabemessung, die die Ergebnisunsicherheit beeinflusst.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
